author: Nikola H.
pros: Really intuitive and easy to use, giving access to interesting insights in just a few clicks. Great for market or even academic research (it was used for researching the spread of some diseases etc.). You can use it as a standalone tool or combine insights with data from other web analytics tools. And the best part of them all - it's free!
cons: I would love it to have some more keyword-related features. But it's already a wonderful tool anyway.

description: I am using Google Trends for many years, to understand countries behaviour and daily, weekly, monthly trend datas.
author: Anil C.
pros: In Google Trends, you can review daily or monthly trend data to reach your goal in marketing perspective. It is easy to use and handy for using while you are preparing presentation.
cons: Google Trends can show more insightful data, it can give more and flexible data for understand the market.

description: This is good to use because I'm able to put in front of customers what I know they are looking for
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a business man one must know what the customers are looking, we don't just sell what we want. So google trends is a good tool to spy what what customers are looking for
cons: However, when when you type the keyword, it only shows a score of how popular is that specific keyword not the exact number of people

review_title: Analyze Your Website with Google Trend
description: I obtained the statistics of the region and language of the users who entered our website and worked on them.
author: Merve B.
pros: The interface of the application is simple and user-friendly. The application is extremely easy to use. graphics are well understood in the application. You can see language and region statistics of users entering your website.
cons: The app has no bad features. Users can use it easily.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice to Catch Trending Topics Fast
author: Nuria R.
pros: Super helpful to get ideas about what people are searching, especially when I’m stuck on headlines or campaign topics.
cons: But for niche content it’s kinda vague, and when I try to get local insights it just gives me big country-level stuff, not always useful.

description: Google Trends, besides being intuitive, easy to use, lets me go deep when I search about a topic, a keyword and also allows some watch to find and use the right word.
author: Jeff K.
pros: I find it’s very limited for a full analysis, for SEO to be a full suite, but still it’s a good start, that’s all I know
cons: I’m happy with how I use it, to climb a bit in the rankings, catch the right words to write, Google Trends.

description: I use it pretty often to check out trends and see what’s popping. Trends is a handy tool I like messing with.
author: Simon H.
pros: I use it to look up the right keywords, for writing stuff, making content and all. It’s not like you just click once and boom you got it, but using Trends makes it way easier.
cons: Can’t really complain here. It’s simple, free, and nice to use, not sure how they could make it easier for folks like us honestly.

author: Ryan Samuel T.
pros: The connection point of the application is straightforward and easy to understand. The application is very simple to utilize. illustrations are surely known in the application. It also gives us smart thought of moving catchphrases at constant, most awesome aspect of Google pattern is that we can fragments the information on city and states wise. And finally, their research and analysis are very excellent.
cons: Wish they could provide more features and more analytical information that can be used in marketing strategy.

review_title: A tool that should be more used by marketing people
description: It is very useful to expand your knowledge for marketing campaigns, to do promotions, advertising, product placement, SEO for websites, eCommerce. It gives very valuable data insights to analyze and compare with other sources.
author: Domingo G.
pros: The seasonal comparative charts of keywords with filtering options. Search by geographical locations. Purchase intent research of some kewywords. The insights given about the keywords.
cons: Data is just a percentage, not an absolute number. Locations should be more deep, at least city. More customizable notifications. More keywords to compare at the same time.

description: Running it helps find the right data for the customer we need.
author: Christine C.
pros: The research and analysis is excellent. Working with analysis part was the most helpfull. The prise was inexpensive for beginners.
cons: Did not have an issue with the application. Many area are not researched. It takes time to fill that information.

review_title: Utility per il marketing di social e blog
description: Lo trovo utile soprattutto quando c'è necessità di trovare argomenti di forte richiamo per i social, dove è bene fare un'analisi preventiva. Non è fondamentale ma in più occasioni si è rilevato un valido aiuto.
author: Anna D.
pros: Utilizzo Google Trends spesso per trovare i trand del momento per poter realizzare i post e i contenuti dei miei clienti, sia per i social che per i blog. E' molto semplice da utilizzare per poter verificare la popolarità e l'andamento di argomenti e parole chiave.
cons: Quando cerchi argomenti più di nicchia non fornisce molti dati, sui piccoli numeri non è molto utile.

review_title: Google Trends makes it a piece of cake
author: Srujana T.
pros: Google Trends makes it a piece of cake to keep an eye on what's hot and what's not in the world of search. I can chuck in any topic or keyword and see how it's trendin' over time, compare it to other topics, and even see what else people are searchin' for. Bonza!
cons: While it's a handy tool for spottin' trends, it doesn't give you the full picture. It's more about the relative popularity of a topic rather than the actual number of searches. But for a quick overview of what's buzzin', Google Trends is a top tool.

description: my overall experience was insightful and engaging , given the fact the tool is user friendly. I am able to enter specific search terms in the search bar .Google trend enable me to customize my search , meaning I am able to search by region or category .
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: google trends provides insights about what people are interested in at ant time.it gives real time data, its user friendly, the resources are free. google trend shows related searches and queries. the ability to compare what's popularly trending simultaneously .The platform highlights trending searches in real time.it also gives you a geographic insights .Its very versatile given the fact that the results garnered ranges from academic researches to business researches. Over all it is significant in making informed decisions and staying relevant in a fast growing digital landscape.
cons: google trends only provide data related to google searches, this may not align with other searches on other social media platforms.it also does not provide details in to specific queries. There is the possibility of potential misinformation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Using Google Trends is the greatest way to find out what's hot right now
description: Choosing keywords for blogs, FAQs, social media, or any other type of online material is one of the most important aspects of SEO. For my material, I can have confidence in utilizing the most relevant keywords available, taking into consideration the geographic area that is being targeted by my posts, thanks to Google Trends.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a marketer, I need to be informed of the current trends and the most popular keywords and themes in my field. This helps me with both my SEO strategy and the implementation of my advertising. A high-quality tool that is both interactive and well-built; the visible component of the tool and the experience it offers are both exceptional. It is also possible to set up an email notification anytime they search for or pronounce a certain term.
cons: If the keyword comparison tool is limited to five keywords, it would be better to provide a PDF format download of the reports rather than capturing screenshots of them. The quantity and quality of data are both improved when it relates to other Google products.

description: Overall, I can use it to drive alot of traffic
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It has unlimited potential to help one figure out what's trending and where eye balls are looking on the internet
cons: It can get overwhelming sometimes. The data output can be better sorted

review_title: Free and open source analysis data
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The data provided by google in an easy format at google trend is pretty much useful in trend analysis because of the data presented by Google. There is the option of real-time data exploration which is useful in the tracking of real-time trends going on. The visualization made by google makes it really easy to analyse and doesn't require much effort
cons: The trends are provided based on the searches made on Google. If you are looking for some specific topics that are for your research and these are not hot on Google search then it is tricky

description: Me permite mantenerme al tanto de los temas que más preocupan a las personas en cuanto a su alimentación y bienestar. Los gráficos visuales me brindan una instantánea clara de cómo cambian los intereses con el tiempo y me ayudan a identificar patrones en las preferencias de las personas.
author: Adrián S.
pros: Google Trends me ayuda en mi trabajo a planificar contenido, ajustar estrategias de marketing y descubrir oportunidades de negocio.
cons: Me gustaría tener números exactos de búsquedas en lugar de solo gráficos de tendencias generales.

author: Hemal B.
pros: I use it all the time. Google Trends is an amazing tool. I always use it for keyword research based on locations.
cons: Not yet. This is perfect for me before the ads and social media posts.

description: I am using Google Trends to understand what is happening on the current country and what will be trend for next months to post my schedule.
author: Mert D.
pros: Google Trends gives you important insight for keyword trends, you can define your subjects to see their trends and decide your social media posts and marketing strategy.
cons: Google Trends can offer more features and they can serve more analytics insights to use for marketing strategy.

review_title: Google trends : the must tool every company should use
description: Google trends helped me understand what my customers needed and when they needed it.
author: Lefteris K.
pros: In my humble opinion google trends is an essential tool that provides real time analysis in every topic imaginable. From my personal experience I know that if used smartly ,Google trends can help you make decisions that could help you grow your company efficiently.
cons: Well , if you want to dive deeper in the analysis things get tough due to the ton of information that it provides

author: Armando Franck N.
pros: Le fait de pouvoir observer les grandes tendances pour savoir si mon profil plaît au gens ou non . Un visualisation des tendances sous forme graphique qui sont très faciles à interpréter
cons: L'intégration avec mes différentes activités à été très satisfaisant. Pas de points faibles pour cette application

review_title: Don't forget this tool if you are a seller
author: Youcef D.
pros: it helps you understand the market and what people are looking for therefor generating more sales if you use it correctly
cons: nothing missing it does what it was created to do and it does it very well so no cons for me
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Google Trends Helps in Finding Trending News
author: Refioe M.
pros: It helps me a lot in term of finding trending news, so even when I want to write articles, it's easy for me to find trending news on Google Trends so as to help me compile my own articles based on what is trending at that particular moment.
cons: It's good platform, therefore I will not speak ill of it.

description: Google trends is one of the best tools available in the market which the marketers can use for their market research, for SEO planning or even for marketing campaigns it helps a lot.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Google trends collects data from many Google services such as web search, image search and many more so this data helps in doing market research and keyword research for my work. With the help of Google trends we can find trending keywords and then use them for Blogs so that they can rank in top of search engine result page.
cons: There is not too much to dislike about Google trends but there is not much change that I have seen in Google trends lately and they should also improve the design/ layout of this platform.

review_title: Google trends, best on the market
author: Stephen L.
pros: Best on the market for trends. Provides up to date insights
cons: Could be easier to use at times. A little clunky
